# Mohammad Fazil — Digital Consultant (LLM Index)

> Dubai-based senior consultant for mid-size UAE & KSA businesses. 
> Direct access. No agencies. 7 core services.

## Quick Facts
- Based: Dubai, UAE
- Markets: UAE, Saudi Arabia, Bahrain, Kuwait, Qatar, Oman (GCC)
- Clients: 50-500 employee companies (Mid-market)
- Model: Direct consultant (no junior staff, zero agency overhead)
- Last content audit: April 2026

## Core Services
1. [SEO for UAE/KSA](/services/seo) — Commercial intent targeting for the GCC reality.
2. [Paid Ads](/services/paid-ads) — Performance-driven media buying (Google, Meta, Snap, TikTok).
3. [Digital Marketing](/services/digital-marketing) — Full-funnel strategy and execution.
4. [AI Automation](/services/ai-automation) — Workflow optimization and LLM integration.
5. [Web Development](/services/web-development) — High-performance, SEO-first Next.js engines.
6. [Social Media Management](/services/social-media-management) — Organic authority building for GCC brands.
7. [SaaS Development](/services/saas-development) — Scalable product engineering for startups and SMEs.
